body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Our long run simulations for the snowy land model use seasonal metrics to assess performance. However, they start and end on January 1. This means that the first full season is MAM (not DJF). Because of this, the last DJF season of the last year is incorrect, because it is missing January and February.

This extends the simulation time to March 1 of the year following the last year.
see : https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/4031 for the plots I am referring to. (ERA rmse bias plots, e..g)

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content

-->

title: Increase simulation end time to encompass a full season

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This PR removes a couple fields from the canopy radiative transfer cache: G, K. we now compute these as needed.

To facilitate this, we also now construct a field of G_Function type, rather than having G_Function hold a field of floats. In the latter case, we could not broadcast like `extinction_coeffiicent.(G_Function, cos theta)` because G_Function held a field which we had to broadcast over. Now we can broadcast like the above.
